What are undervalued homes?
Our Linear Regression model predicts what each home should cost based on its features. If the actual price is lower than predicted, it may be undervalued — a potential deal.

Showing all 1,473 homes under $500K where actual price is below predicted price. Only test set data is used to avoid data leakage.
